title: Removal of Penicillin G from aqueous solutions by a cationic surfactant modified montmorillonite
author: Nourmoradi, Daneshfar, et al.

steps.title: Analytical methods
steps.instruction: The FTIR spectra of the raw-Mt and HDTMA-Mt were specified by a FTIR spectrophotometer (JASCO, FT/IR-6300, Japan) in wavelengths of 400–4000 cm−1. The crystallite structure of the adsorbents was also determined via a X-ray diffractometer (Bruker, D8ADVANCE, Germany) by Ni filtered Cu Kα radiation (1.5406Ao). The concentration of Penicillin G into the cleared solutions was determined by an UV/Vis spectrophotometer (DR5000, Hach, USA).
